entity.name: Prakash
entity.description: Building open source AI agent infrastructure — PocketPaw (Agent OS for everyone) and Soul Protocol (portable AI identity standard). Solo developer from India, community of 31 contributors.

projects.name: PocketPaw
projects.description: Open source self-hosted AI agent that installs in 30 seconds. 6 agent backends, 9+ channels, 50+ tools, 7-layer security with Guardian AI. Desktop installer or one pip command. No Docker required. MIT licensed.

plans.name: Core Development & Distribution
plans.description: Community management, documentation, infrastructure, content production for reaching non-developer users, and security audits.
